single.title: Add Single Sensor
single.description: Track when an entity last changed state or was last seen.

pattern.title: Pattern Matching
pattern.description:
Type a pattern and Submit to add matching entities to the list below. Repeat with more patterns to keep adding; untick anything you don't want. When you're done, leave the pattern empty and Submit to create the sensors.

Matched so far: {count} · selected: {selected}

data.pattern: Pattern (matches entity ID, leave empty to submit selection)

abort.already_configured: Already configured with the same sensor type(s).
abort.cannot_track_self: Cannot track a sensor created by this integration.
abort.added_to_device: Added {count} sensor(s) to existing device entry.
abort.bulk_created: Created {created} new entry/entries. Added {added} to existing devices.

error.no_matches: No matches found for that pattern.
error.no_selection: Tick at least one entity, or enter a pattern to search.

init.title: Options
init.description:
Uncheck any tracked entity to stop tracking it (its sensors will be removed). Removing all entities deletes this entry.

When **Exclude from recorder** is enabled, a YAML package file is written to `config/packages/` and existing history for these sensors is purged. Requires a Home Assistant restart to take effect — see the integration README for setup instructions.

abort.entry_removed: Entry removed — no entities left to track.
